briefdescription.para: This function rounds the length to a 16 bytes boundary.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if action was not successful

briefdescription.para: This function decrypts the HDCP keys.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if action was not successful

briefdescription.para: This function gets a HDCP array from the eeprom.

simplesect.para: The number of bytes read. A value less than the specified input value indicates an error.

briefdescription.para: This function reads a number of bytes from the IIC serial EEPROM into a specified buffer.

parameterdescription.para: contains the address in the EEPROM to read from.
contains the address of the data buffer to be filled.
contains the number of bytes in the buffer to be read. This value is not constrained by the page size of the device such that up to 64K may be read in one call.

simplesect.para: The number of bytes read. A value less than the specified input value indicates an error.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the password from the uart.
This function reads a value from a Key Management block register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the DP RX core instance.
is the register offset of the register (defined at the top of this file).

briefdescription.para: This function writes a value to a Key Management block register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the DP RX core instance.
is the register offset of the register (defined at the top of this file) to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write into the register.

memberdef.argsstring: (u8 *Hdcp22Lc128, u32 Hdcp22Lc128Size, u8 *Hdcp22RxPrivateKey, u32 Hdcp22RxPrivateKeySize, u8 *Hdcp14KeyA, u32 Hdcp14KeyASize, u8 *Hdcp14KeyB, u32 Hdcp14KeyBSize)
memberdef.name: XHdcp_LoadKeys

briefdescription.para: This function loads the HDCP keys from the eeprom.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if action was not successful

briefdescription.para: This function initialize the HDCP 1.4 key manager.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if action was not successful

briefdescription.para: This file contains the Xilinx HDCP key loading utility implementation as used in the DP example design.

detaileddescription.para: Please see xdp_hdcp_keys.h for more details.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 ND 30-12-2020 Initial release
